package rulecoverage

func NegativeStructFieldExposedInJson() string {
    ruleID := "struct_field_exposed_in_json"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "exported struct fields containing sensitive data (Password, Secret, Token, APIKey, PrivateKey) without `json:\"-\"` tags in API response structs"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
